
```{=html}
<section class="business-exchange-card">
  <h2>Professional Contact & Academic Exchange</h2>
  <p>
    This space welcomes professional messages, academic交流, portfolio feedback, and opportunities for collaboration.
    You may use it to connect regarding business studies, analytics, marketing, process improvement, or broader academic discussion.
  </p>
  <ul>
    <li>LinkedIn networking and professional introductions</li>
    <li>Academic discussion, project exchange, and feedback</li>
    <li>Internship, graduate role, or collaboration enquiries</li>
  </ul>
  <p>
    You can also connect via LinkedIn: <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/" target="_blank">Add your LinkedIn link here</a>
  </p>
</section>
```

cd ~/Desktop/Sophia-chen-eportfolio
cp guestbook.qmd guestbook.qmd.backup 2>/dev/null || true
pbpaste > guestbook.qmd
quarto render guestbook.qmd
quarto preview
